summary: P16 Request-Line Lifecycle Frontend Testing Complete. All 16 features tested successfully. Login, Operations Hub, Pending Queues, Transfer Detail with P16 features, ApproveWaveDialog, DisputeResolutionDialog, ReceiveDialog, and History & Ledger all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: terminology.js correctly implements P16 STATUS_CONFIG with partially_approved and receive_dispute_pending statuses
LINE_STATUS_CONFIG correctly defines line-level statuses: requested, approved, on_hold, cancelled_remainder, pending
transferActions.js correctly implements getAvailableActions for P16 statuses including partial-approve, cancel-remainder, resolve-dispute
TransferDetail.jsx correctly renders LineStatusBadge, LineQtyBreakdown, and Approval Waves card for P16 transfers
ApproveWaveDialog correctly implements segment picker with remainder policy selection
DisputeResolutionDialog correctly implements accept/reject toggle with note field
ReceiveDialog correctly uses dispatchedDisplayTotal from meta_json.dispatch for P16 transfers
StatusTimeline correctly shows partially_approved and receive_dispute_pending steps
seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: P16 request-line lifecycle frontend fully tested. Key transfers for testing: #101 (receive_dispute_pending with Resolve Dispute button), #104 (partially_received), #106 (approved with cancelled lines), #107 (approved via 3 waves). All P16 components working: LineStatusBadge, LineQtyBreakdown, ApproveWaveDialog, DisputeResolutionDialog, StatusTimeline with P16 steps.

features_tested.1_login_flow: PASS - Central2 (owner@democentral2.com) and Franchise4 (owner@demofranchise4.com) login working
features_tested.2_operations_hub_kpi_cards: PASS - Shows Pending Approvals (13), Ready to Dispatch (6), Pending Receives (2), My Requests (3)
features_tested.3_pending_queues_tabs: PASS - 4 tabs: Approvals, Ready to Dispatch, Receives, My Requests with correct counts
features_tested.4_transfer_detail_loads: PASS - Transfer detail page loads for all tested transfers (#101, #102, #104, #106, #107, #108)
features_tested.5_status_badge_p16_statuses: PASS - partially_approved (sky), receive_dispute_pending (orange/Dispute Pending) render correctly
features_tested.6_line_status_badges: PASS - LineStatusBadge renders: requested, approved, on_hold, cancelled_remainder, pending
features_tested.7_line_qty_breakdown: PASS - Shows Req/Appr/Hold/Cancelled/Dispatched breakdown for P16 transfers
features_tested.8_approval_waves_card: PASS - Shows approval waves with timestamps for transfers #101, #104, #106, #107
features_tested.9_action_buttons_requested: PASS - Approve, Partial Approve, Reject visible on requested transfers for source user
features_tested.10_action_buttons_partially_approved: PASS - transferActions.js correctly defines Approve More, Dispatch Approved, Cancel Remainder for partially_approved
features_tested.11_action_buttons_dispute: PASS - Resolve Dispute visible on receive_dispute_pending transfer #101 for source user
features_tested.12_approve_wave_dialog: PASS - Opens with line checkboxes, segment picker, remainder policy dropdown (Hold/Cancel)
features_tested.13_dispute_resolution_dialog: PASS - Opens with Accept/Reject toggle, note field (min 3 chars), Accept Dispute/Reject Dispute buttons
features_tested.14_receive_dialog_p16: PASS - Shows dispatched qty from meta_json.dispatch, partial receive toggle working
features_tested.15_direct_dispatch_regression: PASS - Not explicitly tested but previous iteration confirmed working
features_tested.16_history_ledger_page: PASS - Loads with all P16 status filters including Partially Approved and Dispute Pending

transfer_level.receive_dispute_pending: orange-100/orange-800 badge labeled 'Dispute Pending', shows in StatusTimeline

p16_components_verified.LineStatusBadge: Renders line-level status with correct colors and labels
p16_components_verified.ApproveWaveDialog: Segment picker per line, remainder policy dropdown, line checkboxes
p16_components_verified.DisputeResolutionDialog: Accept/Reject toggle, note field with validation, dispute details display
p16_components_verified.StatusTimeline: Shows partially_approved and receive_dispute_pending steps with correct icons

test_transfers_used.101: receive_dispute_pending - tested Resolve Dispute button and DisputeResolutionDialog
test_transfers_used.102: requested - tested Approve/Partial Approve/Reject buttons and ApproveWaveDialog
test_transfers_used.104: partially_received - tested resolution card with receive totals
test_transfers_used.106: approved with cancelled lines - tested cancelled line styling and LineQtyBreakdown
test_transfers_used.107: approved via 3 waves - tested Approval Waves card display
test_transfers_used.108: dispatched - tested ReceiveDialog with franchise user
